data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Additional security layer requiring a second form of verification to access the account.
data.technical_spec: Method: SMS and email-based verification; Enforcement: Optional but encouraged

data.title: Abuse Detection and Prevention
data.description: Detection algorithms are used to identify and prevent spam and abuse on the platform.
data.technical_spec: Machine Learning: Pattern and anomaly detection; Response: Automated and manual review systems

data.title: App Sandbox Environment
data.description: Applications run in a sandboxed environment to minimize exploitation risks.
data.technical_spec: Security Model: iOS and Android sandboxing; Permissions: Strict runtime checks

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security assessments and audits to identify vulnerabilities and apply patches.
data.technical_spec: Framework: OWASP Compliance; Tools: Automated scanners and manual penetration testing

data.title: User Privacy Protections
data.description: Strong privacy policies and practices to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: Policy: GDPR compliance; Data Handling: Minimal data collection; Transparency: User data access logs
